blended.narrative: Granite Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
